name: Wm. Wrigley Jr. Company
description: The Wm. Wrigley Jr. Company, commonly known as the Wrigley Company, is a prominent American multinational corporation specializing in the production and marketing of chewing gum, mints, and confectionery products. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company has established a global presence with iconic brands such as Extra, Orbit, and Doublemint. Founded in 1891, it became a subsidiary of Mars, Incorporated in 2008. Wrigley remains a leader in the snack food industry, recognized for its long-standing history of innovation and its significant influence on the global confectionery market through its diverse portfolio of popular consumer goods.
